page.title: Security
page.description: Posture and traffic signals, with a manual fail2ban override.

traffic.heading: Traffic
traffic.youTitle: This is the IP you're connected from
traffic.filterByIp: Show only this IP's recent requests

empty.title: No traffic
empty.description: No requests seen in the current window.

recentRequests.heading: Recent Requests
recentRequests.noneForIp: No recent requests from this IP in the current window.

empty.title: No requests yet
empty.description: No requests have hit the proxy yet. If this stays empty, check that Caddy's access log is enabled (see the Posture panel).

staleEmpty.title: Host agent not reporting
staleEmpty.description: The host security agent hasn't refreshed recently, so fail2ban state may be out of date. Check the vac-security-agent timer on the host.

notDetected.title: fail2ban not detected
notDetected.description: fail2ban is not installed or readable on this host — recommended on an internet-facing box to auto-ban brute-force attempts. See the Posture panel.

noJails.title: No jails
noJails.description: fail2ban is running but reports no jails.

ban.title: Ban an IP address
ban.description: fail2ban already auto-bans offenders. This is a manual override — ban an IP immediately in the chosen jail.

monitoringOff.title: Monitoring Off
monitoringOff.description: The read-only host security agent isn't enabled, so VAC can't see host state. Turn it on with `vac security-agent on`.

staleEmpty.title: Host agent not reporting
staleEmpty.description: The host security agent hasn't refreshed recently, so firewall state may be out of date. Check the vac-security-agent timer on the host.

notDetected.title: No firewall detected
notDetected.description: No ufw / nftables ruleset is readable on this host. Running an internet-facing box without a firewall is dangerous — enable one, or opt out with <0>vac security-check firewall off</0>.
